paper.title: Prediction of elastic modulus of normal and high strength concrete by support vector machine
paper.material_system: Secondary dataset/modeling of concrete elastic modulus from compressive strength
paper.notes: Contains literature/model input compressive-strength values without source mixture designs; not suitable as direct mix-level database rows.

evidence.evidence_text: The paper uses compressive strength as an input variable to predict elastic modulus; tables report fc and Ec from existing datasets, not new mix-level compositions.

main_risks: No directly extractable cementitious mix-level compressive-strength data in supplied packet.
